## What

<!-- One sentence: what does this PR do? -->

## Why

<!-- What problem does it solve, or what was requested? -->

## Type

- [ ] feat — new feature
- [ ] fix — bug fix
- [ ] perf — performance improvement
- [ ] refactor — no behavior change
- [ ] docs — documentation only
- [ ] chore — config, deps, CI

## Checklist

- [ ] CI passes (frontend + backend)
- [ ] No `console.log` left in code
- [ ] New env vars added to `server/env.example` and `DEPLOY.md`
- [ ] Tests added or updated if behavior changed
- [ ] No `npm install` used — only `bun add` / `bun install`
